daily.today_energy: Your intuition is firing on all cylinders rn. There's a quiet intensity building beneath the surface—lean into that mysterious Scorpio magic. Trust the whispers; they're guiding you somewhere real.
daily.love: Someone's noticing the depth you've been keeping private. Whether single or coupled, vulnerability hits different today. Let them see a little more of what you usually keep locked away.
daily.career: Your ability to read the room is your superpower right now. That project or conversation you've been overthinking? Your instincts know exactly what needs to happen. Move with that certainty.
daily.health: Your body's asking for deeper rest—not just sleep, but actual restoration. Prioritize activities that calm your nervous system. You've been running hot; cooling down is an act of power.

weekly.overview: This week's got that slow-burn energy, Scorpio. Venus is whispering something about authenticity over performance, so expect meaningful convos that hit different. Trust the unfolding—your vibe is magnetic rn.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled or solo, the energy's asking you to get real about what you actually want versus what you think you should want. Deep conversations feel natural this week. Let people see you.
weekly.career: Your intuition about that project or opportunity? Listen to it. This isn't the week to force anything—instead, focus on laying groundwork and having those honest chats with colleagues. Quality over hustle.
weekly.health: Your nervous system might feel a bit activated midweek. Grounding practices like journaling or time outside could feel really restorative. Rest isn't laziness; it's strategic. Your body knows what it needs.
